decontamination_notes: Original scenario authored for VulcanBench on 2026-06-01; not derived from any public repository, issue, or dataset, so it post-dates all model training cutoffs.

fail_to_pass.name: trailing_latest_args
fail_to_pass.cmd: node --experimental-strip-types --test --test-name-pattern='^invokes once on the trailing edge with the latest args$' tests/debounce.test.ts

fail_to_pass.name: not_before_wait
fail_to_pass.cmd: node --experimental-strip-types --test --test-name-pattern='^does not invoke before the wait elapses$' tests/debounce.test.ts

fail_to_pass.name: collapses_burst
fail_to_pass.cmd: node --experimental-strip-types --test --test-name-pattern='^collapses a burst of calls into one$' tests/debounce.test.ts

fail_to_pass.name: leading_edge
fail_to_pass.cmd: node --experimental-strip-types --test --test-name-pattern='^leading invokes immediately and not on the trailing edge$' tests/debounce.test.ts

fail_to_pass.name: cancel
fail_to_pass.cmd: node --experimental-strip-types --test --test-name-pattern='^cancel discards a pending call but the debouncer still works after$' tests/debounce.test.ts
